references.notes: This verse contains an invocation to 'Lord of the House' (رب البيت), a pre-Islamic deity associated with the Kaaba, and mentions 'pilgrims' (الحجاج) performing the pre-Islamic Hajj ritual.
The verse describes a person as a 'frequent pilgrim' (هجاجة), explicitly referencing the pre-Islamic ritual of Hajj.
The term 'الحاج' (pilgrimage) in this verse, especially in conjunction with earlier references, points to the pre-Islamic ritual of Hajj.
